title: Mushkpuri Top
shortDescription: Overnight departure from Lahore with a guided Mushkpuri Top hike and Nathia Gali scenery in one day.
fullDescription: Ready to leave the city at night and wake up in the mountains? Join this 1-day Mushkpuri Top adventure with overnight travel, a guided hike in the morning, and time for sightseeing and photography around Nathia Gali. The trip departs every Saturday night from Thokar Niaz Baig, Lahore. Breakfast and dinner are included so you can focus on the hike and the views.

itinerary.title: Lahore to Mushkpuri Top (Night Departure)
itinerary.description: Depart Lahore at 10:00 PM from Thokar Niaz Baig, travel overnight, hike Mushkpuri Top in the morning, enjoy Nathia Gali viewpoints, and return the same day.

preparations: Pack warm layers for early morning weather
Bring personal medicines and a power bank
precautions: Stay with the group on the trail

title: Swat Kalam
shortDescription: Luxury comfort tour covering Swat, Kalam, Malam Jabba, and the valley highlights.
fullDescription: The Switzerland of Pakistan awaits you. Enjoy deluxe AC transport with pick and drop options from Lahore, Islamabad, Gujrat, Gujranwala, and GT Road. The package includes cozy hotel stays on sharing basis, a bonfire night with BBQ dinner and music, 3 breakfasts and 2 dinners, a professional tour guide, and all tolls and taxes included.
facilities: Pick & drop from Lahore, Islamabad, Gujrat, Gujranwala, and GT Road
Bonfire night with BBQ dinner and musical vibes

itinerary.title: Night Departure & Swat Valley Arrival
itinerary.description: Depart every Monday or Thursday night from Lahore/Islamabad. Scenic travel via GT Road, arrive in Swat, and check in.

itinerary.title: Kalam Valley Highlights
itinerary.description: Visit Kalam Valley, Ushu Forest, and Mahudand Lake with stops at Kalam Bazaar and surrounding viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Malam Jabba & Return
itinerary.description: Explore Malam Jabba, Fizaghat, and Bahrain, then return to the departure city.

preparations: Bring warm layers and rain cover
precautions: Respect local culture and dress norms
Inform the guide about health conditions in advance
terms: Departures every Monday night and Thursday night
Tour may shift due to road and weather conditions

title: Hunza Valley
shortDescription: A quick mountain escape featuring river views and alpine landscapes.
fullDescription: The Naran Kaghan 3-day package is ideal for short vacations and weekend breaks. It includes comfortable travel from Islamabad, major sightseeing points, and a relaxed itinerary for families or friend groups.

itinerary.title: Islamabad to Naran
itinerary.description: Departure early morning, route sightseeing, and check-in at Naran.

itinerary.title: Saif ul Malook and Kaghan
itinerary.description: Excursion to lake area and nearby valleys with photography stops.

itinerary.title: Naran to Islamabad
itinerary.description: Return to Islamabad with lunch and rest breaks on the way.

preparations: Pack rain cover during monsoon season
precautions: Avoid standing near high-flow river edges
Keep children supervised at all scenic points
terms: Rates may vary in peak season

title: One Day Trip
shortDescription: A single-day scenic break with light activities and easy travel.
fullDescription: This one-day package is suitable for travelers looking for a quick and affordable getaway from Islamabad. It includes selected viewpoints, chairlift area access, and enough free time for dining and local shopping.

itinerary.title: City Departure and Scenic Loop
itinerary.description: Morning departure, hill viewpoints, Patriata visit, lunch break, and evening return.

precautions: Stay with group during crowded stops
terms: Final route may adjust due to traffic
